entries.finding: PgPool class already exists in pg-pool.ts with pool, retry, health check, close. Imported and re-exported by db.pg.ts but never actually instantiated/used anywhere.
database-config.ts reads pool config from env vars (poolSize/poolMin/connectionTimeout/idleTimeout/poolRetryMax) but these are NOT passed to initPg() in makePgAdapter() call — only url+ssl forwarded
defaultLayer in adapter.ts has graceful degradation: probes PG with SELECT 1, falls back to SQLite on failure
/global/health endpoint exists but always returns {healthy: true} — does not check PG status
No tests exist for pg-pool.ts anywhere in the test directory
